title: BEM-662 dispatch workflows
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
queue=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue'); queue.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

items={
 'telegram_send_smoke':{'workflow':'telegram-send-smoke.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{}},
 'curator_hourly_report':{'workflow':'curator-hourly-report.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{}},
 'curator_hourly_delivery_verification':{'workflow':'curator-hourly-delivery-verification.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{}},
 'claude_primary_runtime_smoke':{'workflow':'claude-primary-runtime-smoke.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{}}
}
files=[]
for name,data in items.items():
    p=queue/(name+'.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps(data,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    files.append(str(p))

state={'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_items.v1','bem':'BEM-662','status':'queue_items_created','items':items,'files':files,'expected_dispatch_status':'204 for each workflow after codex-runner dispatch queue step','blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:56 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem662_dispatch_telegram_and_runtime_workflows.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem662_dispatch_telegram_and_runtime_workflows.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-662 | Dispatch Telegram And Runtime Workflows | QUEUED'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:56 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Created workflow dispatch queue items. The updated codex-runner dispatch queue step should dispatch them after this task commit.'+sep+sep+'## Queue files'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+f for f in files])+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+'null'+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem662_dispatch_telegram_and_runtime_workflows','cycle_id':'bem662-dispatch-telegram-and-runtime-workflows','source':'executor','status':'queue_items_created','files':files,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:56 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem662_dispatch_telegram_and_runtime_workflows']={'status':'queue_items_created','state_file':str(state_file),'files':files,'blocker':None}
contour_state['workflow_dispatch_queue_status']='queue_items_created'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 15:56 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem662_dispatch_telegram_and_runtime_workflows.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-662 PASS: workflow dispatch queue items created for Telegram/hourly/verifier/Claude runtime.\n')
changed_files.extend(files+[str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Created workflow dispatch queue items for telegram smoke, curator hourly report, delivery verifier, and Claude runtime smoke')
